titleEn: The Wolf and the Seven Young Kids
summaryAm: ሰባት ትንንሽ ግልገሎች በቤት ውስጥ ሲጠብቁ ድምፅን መለየት፣ በር በጥንቃቄ መክፈት እና እርዳታ መጠየቅን የሚማሩበት ተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: በር ከመክፈት በፊት መጠየቅ እና የታመኑ ድምፆችን መለየት ደህንነትን ይጠብቃል።

source.name: Grimm fairy tale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This adaptation removes frightening violence and focuses on safe-home rules.

pages.textAm: እናት ፍየል ሰባት ግልገሎቿን በቤት ትተው ወደ ገበያ ልትሄድ ተዘጋጀች። “የማታውቁትን በር አትክፈቱ” አለቻቸው።
pages.textEn: Mother goat told her seven young kids not to open the door to strangers.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Mother goat gently speaking to seven young kids inside a cozy cottage.

pages.textAm: ግልገሎቹ “እንሰማለን፣ እንጠይቃለን፣ እንጠብቃለን” ብለው በደስታ መለሱ።
pages.textEn: The young kids promised to listen, ask, and wait.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Seven young goats nodding together in a warm cottage room.

pages.textAm: ትንሽ ተኩላ በሩን አንኳኳ። “እኔ ነኝ” አለ። ግልገሎቹ ግን “የእናታችን ድምፅ ለስላሳ ነው፤ እባክህ ቆይ” አሉ።
pages.textEn: A small wolf knocked, but the kids noticed the voice was not mother's.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A small non-scary wolf at the cottage door while young goats listen carefully inside.

pages.textAm: ግልገሎቹ በመስኮቱ የጫካ ጠባቂን አዩ። “እባክዎ ያልታወቀ እንግዳ በሩ ላይ አለ” ብለው ጠሩት።
pages.textEn: The kids saw the forest keeper and asked for help.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Young goats calling to a friendly forest keeper through the cottage window.

pages.textAm: ጠባቂው ተኩላውን በቀስታ ወደ ጫካው መንገድ መራው። “የሌሎችን ቤት መከበር አለብህ” አለው።
pages.textEn: The keeper gently led the wolf back to the forest path.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A forest keeper kindly guiding a small wolf back to a forest path outside the cottage.

pages.textAm: እናት ፍየል ስትመለስ ግልገሎቿ የተማሩትን ነገሯት። እሷም አቅፋቸው “በጥንቃቄ ጠብቃችኋል” አለች።
pages.textEn: When mother goat returned, she hugged the kids and praised their careful choices.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Mother goat hugging seven young kids in a cozy cottage, all safe and smiling.
